title: Analytics - Support Device Opened
scenario: Analytics event logged when user opens Support > Device screen in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. From the Home screen, tap the menu icon or navigate to the Support section.
3. Tap on the Device option under the Support section to open the Support > Device screen.
4. Observe the analytics event being logged in Firebase.
expected: An analytics event is logged in Firebase when the user opens the Support > Device screen. The event includes default analytics elements such as event graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
